case_title: HENRY WONG VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2025 BY JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF HENRY WONG APPEARED. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY RYON HAYWARD, INVESTIGATOR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,800.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
